series_description: Non-federal grant files containing grant applications, grant awards, programmatic and financial reports, budgets, payment letters, program specific audits and correspondence regarding the grant.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office two (2) years after end of grant period, audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved. Electronically scan the Receipt of Acceptance, Project Description/Narrative, Award Notice, Final Payment/Closeout Letter, and documents relating to any legal issues (i.e. special audits, IRS liens, etc.)

series_description: Photocopies of approved payment request forms (form #DASCSA001), invoices or ISTVs, and other supporting documentation used to process non-subsidy vendor payments and ISTVs. Original payment request forms and invoices are given to DAS Central Service Agency to create vouchers.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Files containing documents related to the release and receipt of Requests for Proposals (i.e. RFPs, public notification, technical assistance sessions, receipt list, etc.).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office two (2) years after end of grant period, audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved.

series_description: Files containing grant applications that were not funded due to late receipt or not selected for funding.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office two (2) years after applicant has been notified of non-funding.

series_description: Files containing documents related to grant review and the selection of grants for funding (i.e. administrative review sheets, grant review sheets, conflict of interest statements, etc.)
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office two (2) years after end of grant period, audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved.

series_description: Commission staff daily sign-in and sign-out sheets and agency payroll certification.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved.
